inputs.label: Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Body weight measured with a digital scale

businessContext_i18n.en: Body weight measured with a digital scale
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dijital terazi ile ölçülen vücut ağırlığı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel mesuré avec une balance numérique
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso corporal medido con báscula digital

inputs.label: Waist Circumference (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Waist circumference measured at the narrowest point (usually just above the navel)

businessContext_i18n.en: Waist circumference measured at the narrowest point (usually just above the navel)
businessContext_i18n.tr: En dar noktadan (genellikle göbek deliğinin hemen üstü) ölçülen bel çevresi
businessContext_i18n.de: Taillenumfang gemessen an der schmalsten Stelle (normalerweise knapp über dem Bauchnabel)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tour de taille mesuré au point le plus étroit (généralement juste au-dessus du nombril)
businessContext_i18n.es: Circunferencia de cintura medida en el punto más estrecho (generalmente justo encima del ombligo)
businessContext_i18n.ar: محيط الخصر مقاساً من أضيق نقطة (عادة فوق السرة مباشرة)

inputs.label: Hip circumference (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Hip circumference measured at the widest point (over the hip protrusion)

businessContext_i18n.en: Hip circumference measured at the widest point (over the hip protrusion)
businessContext_i18n.tr: En geniş noktadan (kalça çıkıntısı üzerinden) ölçülen kalça çevresi
businessContext_i18n.de: Hüftumfang gemessen an der breitesten Stelle (über dem Hüftknochen)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tour de hanches mesuré au point le plus large (sur la proéminence des hanches)
businessContext_i18n.es: Circunferencia de cadera medida en el punto más ancho (sobre la protuberancia de la cadera)
businessContext_i18n.ar: محيط الورك مقاساً من أوسع نقطة (فوق نتوء الورك)

inputs.label: Chest circumference (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Chest circumference measured at armpit level, during normal breathing

businessContext_i18n.en: Chest circumference measured at armpit level during normal breathing
businessContext_i18n.tr: Koltuk altı hizasından, normal solunumda ölçülen göğüs çevresi
businessContext_i18n.de: Brustumfang gemessen auf Achselhöhe bei normaler Atmung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tour de poitrine mesuré au niveau des aisselles, en respiration normale
businessContext_i18n.es: Circunferencia de pecho medida a la altura de las axilas, con respiración normal
businessContext_i18n.ar: محيط الصدر مقاساً من مستوى الإبطين أثناء التنفس الطبيعي
